_comment: Power Automate Flow: Warranty Expiry Check (90-day horizon)
_import_instructions: This flow has TWO trigger options:
Option A (Webhook - triggered from SPFx): 'When an HTTP request is received'
Option B (Scheduled - runs automatically): 'Recurrence' every Monday at 08:00 IST
→ For Option B, replace the trigger with a Scheduled flow and
use SharePoint 'Get items' action to query IT_Assets list directly.
Recommended: Use Option B so warranty checks run automatically without opening the app.

trigger_option_a.type: When an HTTP request is received

actions_option_b.filter: WarrantyExpiry ge '@{utcNow()}' and WarrantyExpiry le '@{addDays(utcNow(), 90)}' and Status eq 'Active'

if_true.subject: ⚠️ IT Assets: Warranty Expiring Within 90 Days (@{length(body('Get_items')?['value'])} devices)
if_true.body:
Warranty Expiry Report

The following @{length(body('Get_items')?['value'])} active assets have warranties expiring within 90 days.

@{body('Create_HTML_table')}

Please initiate renewal or replacement procedures.
